name: Ditto
version: Current self-host docs available; exact stable version UNVERIFIED
license: Review current repo license before bundling
what: Omnichannel customer engagement and campaign platform positioned as an open-source Customer.io alternative.
solves: Journey/campaign messaging, customer event ingestion, and engagement automation across channels.
users: Growth/product teams running lifecycle messaging and customer journeys.
fit: Lower fit than Novu + Listmonk/Mautic for the current Hylono stack. Useful only if Hylono wants a dedicated product-engagement platform beyond transactional notifications and basic marketing automation.
runtime: Web app/API/worker platform with database, queueing, and channel-provider integrations.
components: Campaign UI, event ingestion, customer profiles, workers, templates, and delivery-provider connectors.
deploy: Self-host docs mention Docker Compose and Helm. Production still requires message-provider setup and customer data governance.
deps: Database, queues/workers, storage, provider credentials, and ingestion endpoints.
datastores: Relational database and/or analytics stores depending on product design; verify current architecture before deployment.
apis: Event ingestion, campaign APIs, provider integrations, and self-host admin surfaces.
security: Campaign tools centralize customer identifiers and event data. Retention, consent, and preference handling matter.
setup_path: Treat product identity as inferred and version as unverified. Re-check before implementation.
env: DB settings, app URL, secret keys, provider credentials, webhook/event ingestion config, and worker settings.
persistence: Back up DB and preserve campaign/template definitions if adopted.
operations: Deliverability, segmentation correctness, customer data hygiene, and campaign-governance ownership matter more than basic install.
failure_points: Redundant overlap with Novu, Listmonk, Mautic, and direct app logic.
integration: Could ingest product events from Next.js or n8n, but current stack already has better-aligned notification/marketing pieces.
verify: Primary unresolved item: confirm that 'Ditto' in your inventory really refers to Dittofeed.
gdpr: Customer engagement tooling is consent-sensitive by default.
overlap: Heavy overlap with Novu, Listmonk, Mautic, and some n8n-driven lifecycle flows.
codex_read_first: Verify the intended product identity and overlap map before doing anything else.
codex_best_path: Do not implement until an explicit lifecycle-marketing gap remains after Novu/Listmonk/Mautic decisions.
codex_never_assume: Never assume 'Ditto' means Dittofeed. Never assume another customer-messaging platform is needed just because it exists in the long list.

assets.notes: Primary code source if Dittofeed is correct.
